# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - name: vpc-network
    type: google::vpc_network
    properties:
      project: ${project_id}
      name: vpc-network-${random_suffix}
      autoCreateSubnetworks: INTERNAL_IP_ONLY

  - name: backend-subnet
    type: google::compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      parent: ${vpc-network.selfLink}
      region: us-central1
      name: backend-subnet-${random_suffix}

  - name: middleware-subnet
    type: google::compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      parent: ${vpc-network.selfLink}
      region: us-central1
      name: middleware-subnet-${random_suffix}

  - name: frontend-subnet
    type: google::compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      parent: ${vpc-network.selfLink}
      region: us-central1
      name: frontend-subnet-${random_suffix}
